channel.title: Posts on Hugo Learns CS
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on Hugo Learns CS

item.title: init
item.description: My name is Hugo and I’m a pianist and teacher living in Auckland, New Zealand. While I love teaching and I have a lot of fun seeing young (and not so young) musicians grow and improve, I feel like I need a carreer change. I’ve always been interested in programming and computer science, and I went to university for music on a whim. I don’t regret that decision. That being said, it’s time for me to radically change direction and go back to programming.
